hero_subtitle: Learn to think like a prop firm — risk management, discipline, and consistency
hero_subtitle_alt: No signals, no predictions, no gurus. Educational tools for traders who seek consistency.
section_tools: Learn to Think Like a Prop Firm
feature_calc_desc: Learn to size your trades: position sizing, drawdown, and max loss across 44 instruments. Think like a prop firm.
feature_news_desc: Stay informed to make conscious decisions. News curated for education, not emotional trading.
feature_cal_desc: Anticipate volatility with real economic data. Plan your trading around market-moving events.
feature_social_desc: Follow traders who teach consistency, not hype merchants. Learn from those who think like prop firms.
feature_ai_desc: Educational assistant powered by Mistral Large 3: answers on risk management, prop firm rules, and position sizing.
news_description: AI-powered news analysis from Bloomberg, Reuters, and Investing.com
calendar_description: Real-time economic events and market-moving announcements
social_description: Track world leaders, influential traders, and analysts — with AI-powered relevance analysis
ai_description: Ask about risk management, prop firm rules, and trading strategies
ai_greeting_text: Ask me about position sizing, challenge rules, drawdown management, or any trading question.

manifesto_01_text: No signals, no predictions. Calculate your position, understand your drawdown, respect your max loss. That's thinking like a prop firm.
manifesto_02_text: We tell stories that teach financial discipline. Not boring charts — narratives that stick in your memory.
manifesto_03_text: Risk calculator with 44 instruments, AI assistant for challenge rules, economic calendar. Everything you need to trade with consistency.
manifesto_04_text: No Lamborghinis, no magic strategies, no gurus. Just discipline, risk management, and consistent work.
disclaimer_risk_text: Trading financial assets involves substantial risk of loss. This website is an educational and risk management tool. Latin Labs Traders, OpenCode, DNA Funded, and NVIDIA are not responsible for losses, damages, or harm resulting from the use of this platform. The information provided does not constitute financial advice or investment recommendation. Every user is responsible for their own trading decisions.
disclaimer_ai_text: The AI assistant uses the Mistral Large 3 model through the NVIDIA NIM API in test/evaluation mode (free tier). This agent may generate incorrect or inaccurate responses. Always verify the information provided before making trading decisions. Do not rely exclusively on AI-generated responses for financial operations.
ai_disclaimer_text: — AI model in test/evaluation mode. This agent may generate incorrect or inaccurate responses. Always verify information before trading. Do not rely exclusively on AI for financial decisions.
donations_text: Your contribution helps us maintain servers, APIs, and continue developing free educational tools for the Latin American trading community. Thank you for being part of Latin Labs Traders.
donations_note: All addresses belong to the same wallet. Choose the network with the lowest fee.
donations_thanks: Thank you for your support. Every contribution, big or small, motivates us to keep creating quality educational content for the Latin American trading community.
footer_tagline: Professional trading portal for serious traders
